action: Replace relay unit on Signal S11 — third recurrence of relay corrosion pattern
reason: Signal S11 shows current anomaly consistent with relay resistance drift observed in INC-044 and INC-061. Three relay failures on same asset indicate systemic environmental vulnerability. Marine-grade relay with enhanced corrosion protection required.

evidence.title: INC-061
evidence.summary: Pre-failure resistance drift — preventive relay replacement

evidence.title: Multiple Relay Failures Indicate Systemic Issue
evidence.summary: Three or more relay failures within 18 months indicates environmental root cause

expectedOutcome: Elimination of current anomaly and prevention of failure for minimum 24 months with marine-grade specification

action: Inspect and replace weather housing seal on Signal S11
reason: Pre-monsoon conditions approaching. INC-057 demonstrated water ingress through degraded seal. Seal replacement due.

evidence.title: INC-057
evidence.summary: Water ingress through degraded seal during heavy rainfall

expectedOutcome: Prevention of water ingress during upcoming monsoon season

action: Install continuous relay resistance monitoring on Signal S11
reason: INC-061 demonstrated that resistance drift monitoring enables preventive maintenance. S11 recurring failure pattern justifies permanent monitoring.
expectedOutcome: Early warning of future relay degradation allowing planned replacement vs emergency response

action: Schedule immediate maintenance for Signal S12 — 240 days overdue
reason: S12 maintenance overdue by 240 days with adjacent S11 in critical state. INC-012 shows S12 has same failure pattern risk as S11.

evidence.title: INC-012
evidence.summary: S12 relay corrosion — same zone risk as S11

expectedOutcome: Prevention of S12 failure during same period as S11 investigation

action: Lubricate and inspect switch motor on SW-002
reason: Slow operation warning on SW-002. INC-023 history shows same asset susceptibility to point motor issues.

evidence.title: INC-023
evidence.summary: Point motor overheating — resolved by replacement

expectedOutcome: Restoration of normal switch operation time (<7 seconds)

action: Schedule ultrasonic inspection for Track TRK-003 — high utilization
reason: TRK-003 has not been ultrasonically inspected in 7 months. INC-031 crack detection history and high utilization status require bi-annual inspection per SOP-TRK-01.

evidence.title: High Utilization Tracks Require Bi-Annual Inspection
evidence.summary: Bi-annual inspection required for high utilization tracks

expectedOutcome: Early detection of any developing crack before failure

action: Perform quarterly calibration check on Signal S15 — overdue
reason: S15 quarterly calibration is overdue. INC-038 and INC-008 history shows calibration drift risk on mountain route.

evidence.title: Mountain Route Signals Require Quarterly Calibration

expectedOutcome: Correction of any temperature-induced calibration drift

action: Annual salt spray inspection for Signal S20
reason: S20 annual salt spray inspection due. INC-052 connector failure pattern. Port proximity requires marine-grade maintenance schedule.

evidence.title: Port Proximity Requires Marine-Grade Maintenance
evidence.summary: Annual salt spray inspection mandatory for port-adjacent signals

expectedOutcome: Detection of corrosion before communication failure
